# korea-ai-basic-act-mcp

> Korea AI Basic Act compliance MCP — in force since 22 Jan 2026. High-impact AI + mandatory GenAI labelling + MSIT obligations + cross-walks to EU AI Act + Japan AI Promotion. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- classify_system_impact
- check_genai_labelling_required
- assess_business_type
- get_obligations_checklist
- sign_compliance_attestation
- cross_walk_eu_ai_act
- cross_walk_jp_ai_promotion

## Install
```
pip install korea-ai-basic-act-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/korea-ai-basic-act-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
